beats.text: Karen sets her drink down. Deliberately. The entire yard notices without looking.

beats.speaker: Karen
beats.text: No. No. I'm done. I'm done today, David.
She picks the glass back up. Pulls her arm back. Hesitates. Then throws only the ice. Not the glass. The ice. It's somehow worse.

end_a.text: Karen walks away. The ice melts into the lawn. Something in the marriage melts with it.

end_b.text: Dad keeps his mouth shut. It might be the smartest thing he's done all day. It's also too late.
